image:image.image:title: GBP/USD Short Signal (1H)
image:image.image:caption: GBP/USD 1-hour chart showing a MerikaBoss short trade signal with entry, stop loss, and three take-profit targets.

image:image.image:title: CAD/JPY Long Signal (1H)
image:image.image:caption: CAD/JPY 1-hour chart showing a MerikaBoss long trade signal with entry, stop loss, and take-profit levels hit.

image:image.image:title: EUR/AUD Supply & Demand Short (1H)
image:image.image:caption: EUR/AUD 1-hour chart with supply and demand zones and a MerikaBoss short trade signal.

image:image.image:title: AUD/CHF Demand Zone Long (1H)
image:image.image:caption: AUD/CHF 1-hour chart showing a long trade entering from a demand zone with take-profit targets.

image:image.image:title: BTC/USD Support & Resistance Map
image:image.image:caption: Bitcoin BTC/USD 1-hour chart showing verified and untested support and resistance zones with retest counts.

image:image.image:title: Indicator Calculations & Logic
image:image.image:caption: Handwritten breakdown of the mathematical logic and calculations behind a supply and demand and S&R trading indicator.

image:image.image:title: Supply & Demand + S&R Strategy Flow
image:image.image:caption: Flowchart diagram explaining how a supply and demand and support resistance trading indicator detects and manages zones.

image:image.image:title: Price Action Signal Strategy Flow
image:image.image:caption: Flowchart showing a support and resistance price action trading strategy from pivot detection to trade entry and exit.
